message:
fix(ci): cross-platform conformance fixture tests for Windows

- Remove OS-specific error_contains from read_nonexistent_file and
  read_directory (Windows gives different error messages than Unix)
- Replace run_command/python3 with create_file for grep_truncates_long_lines
  (bash not available on Windows CI)
- Make fixture runner RunCommand step use cmd.exe on Windows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
